'''âj-ch-dh-r''' ('''kajachdheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cumulate|cumulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cumulate|cumulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-ch-dh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajachdheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijachdheroko|thijachdheroko]] || [[word:jijachdheroko|jijachdheroko]] || [[word:shijachdheroko|shijachdheroko]] || [[word:kijachdheroko|kijachdheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujachdheroko|thuthujachdheroko]] || [[word:jujujachdheroko|jujujachdheroko]] || [[word:shushujachdheroko|shushujachdheroko]] || [[word:kukujachdheroko|kukujachdheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujachdheroko|thujachdheroko]] || [[word:jujachdheroko|jujachdheroko]] || [[word:shujachdheroko|shujachdheroko]] || [[word:kujachdheroko|kujachdheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujachdheroko|thujachdheroko]] || [[word:jujachdheroko|jujachdheroko]] || [[word:shujachdheroko|shujachdheroko]] || [[word:kujachdheroko|kujachdheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejachdheroko|thejachdheroko]] || [[word:jejachdheroko|jejachdheroko]] || [[word:shejachdheroko|shejachdheroko]] || [[word:kejachdheroko|kejachdheroko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojachdheroko|thojachdheroko]] || [[word:jojachdheroko|jojachdheroko]] || [[word:shojachdheroko|shojachdheroko]] || [[word:kojachdheroko|kojachdheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojachdheroko|thojachdheroko]] || [[word:jojachdheroko|jojachdheroko]] || [[word:shojachdheroko|shojachdheroko]] || [[word:kojachdheroko|kojachdheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjachdheroko|thĂŠjachdheroko]] || [[word:jĂŠjachdheroko|jĂŠjachdheroko]] || [[word:shĂŠjachdheroko|shĂŠjachdheroko]] || [[word:kĂŠjachdheroko|kĂŠjachdheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajachdheroko|thathajachdheroko]] || [[word:jajajachdheroko|jajajachdheroko]] || [[word:shashajachdheroko|shashajachdheroko]] || [[word:kakajachdheroko|kakajachdheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajachdheroko|thajachdheroko]] || [[word:jajachdheroko|jajachdheroko]] || [[word:shajachdheroko|shajachdheroko]] || [[word:kajachdheroko|kajachdheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajachdheroko|thajachdheroko]] || [[word:jajachdheroko|jajachdheroko]] || [[word:shajachdheroko|shajachdheroko]] || [[word:kajachdheroko|kajachdheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
